items.quote: Rarely, if ever, are any of us healed in isolation. Healing is an act of communion.
items.author: bell hooks

items.quote: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
items.author: Helen Keller

items.quote: I am not what happened to me, I am what I choose to become.
items.author: Carl Jung

items.quote: No matter how isolated you are and how lonely you feel, if you do your work truly and conscientiously, unknown friends will come and seek you.
items.author: Carl Jung
